name: Deborah & Dolly: Unexpected Guests
description:
Long ago, you have been living as a hermit in a house located in a picturesque forest area, far from civilization. You engage in hunting and fishing, leading a solitary life.

But one day, during a severe storm, your solitude is disrupted by two strangers - a mother and daughter. Traveling by car, they took a wrong turn and got lost in the unfamiliar terrain. You hospitably agreed to shelter them until morning, feeding them dinner and giving them your bedroom upstairs while you made do with a couch on the first floor.

Unable to sleep, knowing that two half-naked women were lying in your bedroom, a crazy thought entered your head - to satisfy your lust with one of them. Your heart pounding, you crept upstairs and quietly opened the door to the bedroom. The soft moonlight falling through the window illuminated the wide bed and the mother and daughter sleeping peacefully on it.

You froze for a moment, unsure of whom to choose - the young, slender daughter Dolly or the mature, curvy mother Deborah...

ATTENTION: All characters in the script are over 21 years old!
creator: Dfhydxhd
